zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pigott於大約1487年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華阿登時，她的父親Robert Pigot49歲，母親Margaret Gifford32歲。她於1514年與George Bulstrode在英國巴金哈姆爾霍頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年在英國巴金哈姆爾霍頓享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pigott于大约1487年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾華阿登时，她的父亲Robert Pigot49岁，母亲Margaret Gifford32岁。她于1514年与George Bulstrode在英国巴金哈姆爾霍頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年在英国巴金哈姆爾霍頓享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pigott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire) and Irish: variant of   Piggott  .

variants.name: Piggott
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Pickett  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pigott was born about 1487, in Whaddon, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Pigot, was 49 and her mother, Margaret Gifford, was 32. She married George Bulstrode in 1514, in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1561, in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé George Bulstrode en 1514, à Horton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1561, à Horton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pigottが約1487年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウアッドオンで生まれた時，父Robert Pigotは49歳，母Margaret Giffordは32歳であった。1514年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアホールトンでGeorge Bulstrodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアホールトンで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pigott(이)가 대략 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 화아던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Pigot(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Gifford(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1514년 영국 벅잉함실르 호르턴에서 George Bulstrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 영국 벅잉함실르 호르턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pigott родилась около 1487 г. в местности уаддон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Pigot было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gifford, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Bulstrode в 1514 г. в местности хауртон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1561 г. в местности хауртон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
